product_surfaces: internal/cache migration runner invoked by NewSQLiteStore over in-memory SQLite
internal/cache schema_version table and current schema version reporting
internal/cache initial SQLite schema for sources, identity_map, links, remote_revisions, sync_events, conflicts, chunks, and fts_index when FTS5 is available
internal/cache chunks schema with nullable embedding BLOB DEFAULT NULL and UNIQUE(source_id, content_hash, byte_start)
internal/cache UpsertSourceGraph, UpsertChunk, and GetChunks over production SQLite accessors
internal/cache SearchSources abstraction using FTS5 when available and deterministic LIKE fallback when forced

004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.product_surface: internal/cache migration runner, schema_version, table/index DDL, FTS availability detection, chunks.embedding column
004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.acceptance_evidence: in-memory SQLite store reports current schema version, required tables/indexes exist, fts_index exists only when FTS is enabled, and chunks.embedding is nullable with NULL default

004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.product_surface: internal/cache chunk schema, UpsertSourceGraph, UpsertChunk, GetChunks, deterministic chunk identity
004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.acceptance_evidence: two chunks with the same source_id/content_hash and different byte_start values persist, duplicate byte-start insertion is rejected, and repeated graph chunk upsert is idempotent through deterministic ids

004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.product_surface: internal/cache SearchSources over FTS-enabled and forced-fallback stores
004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.acceptance_evidence: identical source data yields equivalent visible result ids, snippets, line fields, kind-filtered results, deterministic ordering, and JSON-serializable SearchResult values

004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.product_surface: internal/cache runMigrations rerun on an already migrated database
004-cache-store-task-2-add-schema-and-se.acceptance_evidence: second migration runner invocation exits successfully and leaves schema_version at the expected current version without duplicate schema rows or corruption

mocks_used: none; local in-memory SQLite only with forced fallback mode for FTS parity coverage
